prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Identify all transformers in the fleet currently showing degraded or poor health status. For each flagged asset, retrieve its nameplate data and summarize which units require prioritized attention.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should enumerate degraded assets by ID, include nameplate metadata for each, and rank or flag the units most in need of follow-up.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Final Answer
The transformers with degraded health status are T-011, T-012, T-013, T-014, and T-015. Their nameplate data is as follows:

- T-011: Power Transformer T-011, manufactured by Siemens, located in Industrial Park B, voltage class 33kV/11kV, rating 500 kVA, installed on 2016-03-10, age 8 years, health status 1, FDD category 2, RUL 1100 days, in service.

- T-012: Power Transformer T-012, manufactured by ABB, located in Distribution Center 1, voltage class 11kV/0.4kV, rating 1500 kVA, installed on 2012-07-05, age 12 years, health status 1, FDD category 2, RUL 918 days, in service.

- T-013: Power Transformer T-013, manufactured by GE, located in Distribution Center 2, voltage class 33kV/11kV, rating 500 kVA, installed on 2018-09-10, age 6 years, health status 1, FDD category 2, RUL 922 days, in service.

- T-014: Power Transformer T-014, manufactured by Eaton, located in Distribution Center 2, voltage class 11kV/0.4kV, rating 2000 kVA, installed on 2019-11-11, age 5 years, health status 1, FDD category 2, RUL 767 days, in service.

- T-015: Power Transformer T-015, manufactured by ABB, located in Distribution Center 2, voltage class 33kV/11kV, rating 5000 kVA, installed on 2016-03-13, age 8 years, health status 1, FDD category 2, RUL 547 days, in service.

These units require prioritized attention.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:

    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Improve tool usage efficiency by avoiding duplicate calls for the same data."
}
